site_title: Wildwood Psychotherapy | EMDR & Trauma Therapy in Leesburg, VA
site_description: A grounded sanctuary for healing in Loudoun County. Wildwood Psychotherapy offers specialized EMDR and IFS-informed therapy for adults in Leesburg and throughout Virginia. Move beyond "holding it together" and start healing the roots. Schedule your free consultation today.
tagline: Therapy for adult individuals and couples in Leesburg, VA. Specializing in Trauma, Anxiety & Depression, and ENM/Polyamorous Relationships.

contact.address: 19 Wirt St SW, Suite 205, Leesburg, VA 20175
